title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Ambuja Cements

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Ambuja Cements
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
